findings.title: Reserve-road telemetry does not identify blocked remote expansion
findings.kpiDeltaObserved: Owned room count stayed flat and the selected reserve candidate had no fresh progress evidence.
findings.reliabilityGuardrailsObserved: Runtime summaries were present; no secret-bearing official API payloads were copied.
findings.hypothesis: A blocked reserve path is not surfaced as a first-class finding, so the scheduler cannot fan out a bounded code task.
findings.expectedKpiMovement: Accepted findings produce concrete P1 backlog items before the next Gameplay Evolution review cycle.
findings.acceptanceEvidence: Dry-run output shows the exact issue title, labels, milestone, parent link, source artifact link, and Project field updates.
findings.rollbackStopCondition: Stop using the generated issue if the source review artifact is corrected or the finding is rejected as duplicate.
findings.noSecretConsiderations: Only sanitized review metadata and repo-relative artifact paths are included.
findings.scope: Automate the GitHub issue creation handoff for accepted Gameplay Evolution review findings.
